column1: "Nobody wants to play with me" she said_______ . (SAD)
Nobody wanted to play with her. She felt_________ . (SAD)
She looked at us____________and did not say a word. (SAD)
Towards the end of their__________, stars swell up and become as much as 100 times_________ . (LIFE/BIG)
You had a party yesterday, didn't you? Did you enjoy____________? - Yes, we did. (YOU)
Torosaurus had the__________head of any land animal that has ever lived._____________head was as__________as a modern car. (LARGE/IT/LONG)
Which season do you like_________: summer or winter? (GOOD)
